title: Skill-SE-Kit Feedback
description: Structured feedback passed to skill-se-kit run --feedback-json or runtime.run_integrated_skill(feedback=...).

status.description: Whether the execution outcome was positive or negative.

lesson.description: A reusable insight extracted from this execution. Should be specific enough to guide future behavior.

source.description: Origin of this feedback. Use 'explicit' for agent-constructed feedback, 'user_input' for user-originated signals, 'execution_result' for auto-extracted feedback.

confidence.description: Confidence in this feedback. Below min_feedback_confidence (default 0.35), the experience is stored but skipped for skill-bank mutation.

reasoning.description: Optional detailed reasoning behind the lesson.

examples.lesson: When clicking elements in shadow DOM, use page.evaluate() to pierce the shadow root instead of direct CSS selectors.
examples.reasoning: Direct querySelector failed on 3 consecutive attempts; switching to evaluate() with shadow root traversal succeeded immediately.

examples.lesson: For paginated API responses, always check the 'next' link header before assuming all results are returned.
